case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC VS. DAVID CASTILLO

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, DAVID SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2013
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 395(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-17-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC SERVED FEB-20-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, DAVID
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-17-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
